text.title: Go Error Handling
text.summary: AppError struct with Unwrap, sentinel error vars, constructors, and HTTP mapping middleware.

section.title: AppError Struct

rule.statement: Use AppError with Code, Message, HTTPStatus, and Err fields. Implement Error() and Unwrap() to enable errors.Is and errors.As.
rule.rationale: Typed errors with Unwrap() allow callers to inspect the error chain without string comparison. HTTP status stays out of business logic.

section.reference: Complete AppError implementation with sentinels and ErrorHandler.

rule.statement: Use sentinel vars (ErrNotFound) when callers check for a specific error type. Use constructors (NewNotFound(resource)) when the message must be dynamic.
rule.rationale: Sentinel vars enable errors.Is comparison; constructors add context without breaking the chain via Wrap.

rule.statement: Check error types with errors.Is / errors.As, not string comparison. Never compare err.Error() strings.
rule.rationale: String comparison breaks when error messages are localized or reformatted. errors.Is traverses the Unwrap chain correctly.
